title: rotang melanoloma
intro: Rotang melanoloma, commonly known as the "Indian staff tree," is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic. The therapeutic actions of Rotang melanoloma include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate pain and soothe wounds. The bioactive constituents of the plant include meliacin, melianthone, and other triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
